proceduretest

Class RestrictedPathExpander

  • java.lang.Object
    • proceduretest.RestrictedPathExpander
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    org.neo4j.graphdb.PathExpander<java.lang.String>

    public class RestrictedPathExpander
extends java.lang.Object
implements org.neo4j.graphdb.PathExpander<java.lang.String>
    The Class RestrictedPathExpander implements the Interface PathExpander and is used to filter the relationships which are used by AStar during traversal so that only relationships which have the right type and fulfill the given restrictions are used by AStar.
    Version:
    1.0
    Author:
    Nikita Maslov

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      RestrictedPathExpander(Query query)
      Constructor for the Class RestrictedPathExpander.

      java.lang.Iterable<org.neo4j.graphdb.Relationship> expand(org.neo4j.graphdb.Path path, org.neo4j.graphdb.traversal.BranchState<java.lang.String> state)
      This method is used by AStar during traversal to get the nodes which are used to traverse further.
      org.neo4j.graphdb.PathExpander<java.lang.String> reverse()
      This Method has to be implemented by every class which implements the interface PathExpander.

        equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • RestrictedPathExpander

        public RestrictedPathExpander(Query query)
        Constructor for the Class RestrictedPathExpander.
        Parameters:
        query - An Query Object which contains the relationship types and the property restrictions.

    • Method Detail

      • expand

        public java.lang.Iterable<org.neo4j.graphdb.Relationship> expand(org.neo4j.graphdb.Path path,
                                                                 org.neo4j.graphdb.traversal.BranchState<java.lang.String> state)
        This method is used by AStar during traversal to get the nodes which are used to traverse further.
        Specified by:
        expand in interface org.neo4j.graphdb.PathExpander<java.lang.String>
        Parameters:
        path - The path which has been traversed by AStar by now.
        state - The branch state. AStar always sets this to the same, default value.
        Returns:
        An Iterable with relationships which are used by AStar for further traversal.

      • reverse

        public org.neo4j.graphdb.PathExpander<java.lang.String> reverse()
        This Method has to be implemented by every class which implements the interface PathExpander. As it is not used by AStar in only returns null in this case.
        Specified by:
        reverse in interface org.neo4j.graphdb.PathExpander<java.lang.String>
        Returns:
        null.
